creator: corky1951@comcast.net
text:
Update to 0.9.41
Several bugfixes.  Now uses default Gnome/GTK icon theme.

Add USE_GMAKE=yes (libXGP build fails otherwise).

Note that devel/libXGP is the same port under a different name, 
and builds a library with additional functionality.  The committer
is advised to test both devel/libYGP and devel/libXGP, 
since they also trigger different pkg-plist lines.

Fix: -----------
Files Added:
None
-----------
Files Deleted:
files/patch-configure
-----------
